primary_origin: author-defined from public reports, standards-related material, and subsystem scope decisions
processing: documented as included/excluded subsystems before generation
does_not_support: complete product hazard coverage or regulatory compliance

primary_origin: compact summaries of public reports, recalls, standards-related material, manuals, and prior literature
processing: source identifiers are injected into M3/M4 prompts and recorded in evidence_trace fields
audit_check: source IDs can be traced to evidence_pack files and manuscript references
does_not_support: proof that a row is technically correct

primary_origin: LLM-generated candidate DFMEA artifact under bounded prompts
processing: normalized to shared CSV schema and retained/revised by author workflow
audit_check: required-field and boundary checks; critic notes for M4 rows
does_not_support: ground-truth failure mechanisms, field frequency, or mitigation effectiveness

primary_origin: LLM-estimated early DFMEA ratings under shared anchors
processing: stored as integers in normalized CSV
audit_check: range validity only; no expert calibration yet
supports: RPN recomputation and high-risk/high-severity structural summaries
does_not_support: validated risk priority or calibrated severity/occurrence/detection

primary_origin: product of S, O, and D fields
processing: stored in CSV and recomputed by metric scripts

primary_origin: M4 critic/review role output or ablation marker

processing: rows marked keep or artifact-specific status

primary_origin: deterministic scripts over normalized CSV files
processing: computed from required fields, evidence_trace, duplicate pairs, RPN arithmetic, and row counts
audit_check: recompute scripts and source data provided
supports: traceability, completeness, duplication, and arithmetic-consistency claims

primary_origin: generated from metric summaries and source-data files
processing: Python figure script and markdown tables
does_not_support: additional empirical evidence beyond the source metrics
